title: FM: all in one
description: a mod based of inside jokes between my friendgroup, adds many new bosses, mobs, and weapons.
body:
The funkyverse mod is a mod based on inside jokes between my friend group, it also includes some internet memes and jokes.

this doesnt mean that nobody else can have fun playing with the mod, anybody can download this mod and have a fun time with the additions that it adds, those being:

Mobs

-Critters

critters are small black imp like creatures that live in forests, they tend to spawn in large groups and like sticking together, they will target players on sight and can be somewhat deadly when in large packs.

they can be tamed with cooked beef.

-Spora

Spora rarely spawns in jungle and bamboo jungle biomes. if attacked they will turn into a larger version of the same mob and will start to attack their attacker.

it can be tamed with nightshade, wich spawns in all jungle biomes and poisons the player when eaten. 

spora doesnt turn into their large form if tamed.

-Deciever

the deciever will spawn randomly in plains and forest biomes and will look exactly like a cow, the only difference is that they will stare and constantly walk towards players and villagers alike. when they hit a entity or are hit by an entity they will turn into their true form.

when in that form they will attack all player, villigers, and animals. after killing atleast one they will turn back into their disguised form.

-Famix

famix is a large water creature that will attack all creatures and players on sight that can rarely spawn in any ocean biome that isnt warm.

if you encounter it, hide.

----~---~---~BOSSES~---~---~----

all of these bosses do not spawn naturally, instead you have to preform certian actions to summon them.

-Colbit

summoned by using a frozen emerald wich is crafted by sorrounding an emerald with blue ice and regular ice in a crafting table.

-Jerry

summoned by saying his name in chat. while holding a jerry mirror in your hand wich is crafted with jerry material and glass.

jerry material is gained by feeding rotten flesh to a chicken at sundown.

-Hank

summoned by using a hank item wich is made by getting hit with a demon cores blast when you have the stupidness effect made by brewing a cake into water bottles.

-Nuro

summoned by fishing in a lake that has a nuro block in it, nuroblocks naturally spawn randomly in rivers and lakes.

-The cat

is naturally found spawning in haunted houses wich spawn in dark forest and taiga biomes.

the cat can only be harmed by the cross, holy water, and other mobs.

-Alex the axolotl

is summoned when a mob is killed by the blood drainer ontop of a sacrafical altar.

the blood drainer is crafted with redston, a stick, a diamond, and two rotten flesh.

the sacrafical alter is made right clicking with the blood drainer on a stone slab.

 

----~---~---~STRUCTURES~---~---~----

-Waterpark warehouse

ironically enough doesnt spawn near water 100% of the time but spawns near beaches, stoney shores, and the the dark forest. 

there will always be 5 different mobs that only spawn in this structure within it. 

-Haunted house

spawns in taiga and darkforest biomes.

spawns with the cat inside aswell as a cross.
